title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Kirloskar Electric - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Kirloskar Electric - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Process Engineer looking for your next big career move? Kirloskar Electric in Surat offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Kirloskar Electric:
Kirloskar Electric is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Flexible working hours
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Surat, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Kirloskar Electric!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
